# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    host: user-service
    port: 80
    path: /user
    proto: http
    created_at: 1657342314
    updated_at: 1657342314
    connect_timeout: 1000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000

  - name: product-service
    host: product-service
    port: 80
    path: /product
    proto: http
    created_at: 1657342314
    updated_at: 1657342314
    connect_timeout: 1000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000

routes:
  - name: user-route
    protocols:
      - name: grpc
        port: 80
    paths:
      - /user
    service:
      name: user-service
      protocol: grpc
    created_at: 1657342314
    updated_at: 1657342314

  - name: product-route
    protocols:
      - name: grpc
        port: 80
    paths:
      - /product
    service:
      name: product-service
      protocol: grpc
    created_at: 1657342314
    updated_at: 1657342314

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_in_query_string: username
  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      headers:
        X-RateLimit-Limit: 100
        X-RateLimit-Remaining: 99
        X-RateLimit-Reset: 1657342314
